ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>The response is contextually relevant but lacks naturalness and persona consistency in urgency, which are crucial for a merchant. baseline_no_context<TAB>5<TAB>4<TATB>3<TAB>2<TAB>The response is contextually relevant but lacks naturalness, which are crucial for a merchant to sound more convincing in their dialogue. Short note: Needs improvement on tone and language use to better reflect the character'
